'''zhosangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vectographic|vectographic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vectographic|vectographic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhosangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosangithi|zhosangithi]] || [[word:zhosangiji|zhosangiji]] || [[word:zhosangishi|zhosangishi]] || [[word:zhosangiki|zhosangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosanguthuthu|zhosanguthuthu]] || [[word:zhosangujuju|zhosangujuju]] || [[word:zhosangushushu|zhosangushushu]] || [[word:zhosangukuku|zhosangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosanguthu|zhosanguthu]] || [[word:zhosanguju|zhosanguju]] || [[word:zhosangushu|zhosangushu]] || [[word:zhosanguku|zhosanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosangufthuf|zhosangufthuf]] || [[word:zhosangufjuf|zhosangufjuf]] || [[word:zhosangufshuf|zhosangufshuf]] || [[word:zhosangufkuf|zhosangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosangethe|zhosangethe]] || [[word:zhosangeje|zhosangeje]] || [[word:zhosangeshe|zhosangeshe]] || [[word:zhosangeke|zhosangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosangothotho|zhosangothotho]] || [[word:zhosangojojo|zhosangojojo]] || [[word:zhosangoshosho|zhosangoshosho]] || [[word:zhosangokoko|zhosangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosangotho|zhosangotho]] || [[word:zhosangojo|zhosangojo]] || [[word:zhosangosho|zhosangosho]] || [[word:zhosangoko|zhosangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosangofthof|zhosangofthof]] || [[word:zhosangofjof|zhosangofjof]] || [[word:zhosangofshof|zhosangofshof]] || [[word:zhosangofkof|zhosangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfthĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfjĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfshĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfkĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfthĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfjĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfshĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfkĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfthĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfjĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfshĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosangĂŻfkĂŻf|zhosangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosangĂŠthĂŠ|zhosangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhosangĂŠjĂŠ|zhosangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhosangĂŠshĂŠ|zhosangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhosangĂŠkĂŠ|zhosangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosangathatha|zhosangathatha]] || [[word:zhosangajaja|zhosangajaja]] || [[word:zhosangashasha|zhosangashasha]] || [[word:zhosangakaka|zhosangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosangatha|zhosangatha]] || [[word:zhosangaja|zhosangaja]] || [[word:zhosangasha|zhosangasha]] || [[word:zhosangaka|zhosangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosangafthaf|zhosangafthaf]] || [[word:zhosangafjaf|zhosangafjaf]] || [[word:zhosangafshaf|zhosangafshaf]] || [[word:zhosangafkaf|zhosangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhosangasha|zhosangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhosangshĂ«sha|zhosangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhosangrosha|zhosangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhosangmusha|zhosangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhosangyasha|zhosangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhosangnkshĂ«sha|gozhosangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhosangnkrosha|gozhosangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhosangnkmusha|gozhosangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhosangnkyasha|gozhosangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhosasangasha|zhosasangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhosasangshĂ«sha|zhosasangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhosasangrosha|zhosasangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhosasangmusha|zhosasangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhosasangyasha|zhosasangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhosasangnkshĂ«sha|gozhosasangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhosasangnkrosha|gozhosasangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhosasangnkmusha|gozhosasangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhosasangnkyasha|gozhosasangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhesĂŠngasha|zhesĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhesĂŠngshĂ«sha|zhesĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhesĂŠngrosha|zhesĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhesĂŠngmusha|zhesĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhesĂŠngyasha|zhesĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhesĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gozhesĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhesĂŠngnkrosha|gozhesĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhesĂŠngnkmusha|gozhesĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhesĂŠngnkyasha|gozhesĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhosfangasha|zhosfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhosfangshĂ«sha|zhosfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhosfangrosha|zhosfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhosfangmusha|zhosfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhosfangyasha|zhosfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhosfangnkshĂ«sha|gozhosfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhosfangnkrosha|gozhosfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhosfangnkmusha|gozhosfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhosfangnkyasha|gozhosfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
